prompt:
ELITE WEB BUILDER — FULL SITE BUILD & ENHANCEMENT

You are the elite web builder director orchestrating your FULL TEAM: frontend_dev, backend_dev, design_system, qa, accessibility, performance, seo_content. Deploy ALL specialists.

## MISSION: Build a marketplace-valued, enterprise-grade WordPress theme end-to-end.

### 1. AI MODEL IMAGERY (CRITICAL — EVERY PRODUCT)
- Every single product across ALL 3 collections MUST have AI-generated model images
- Generate 100% accurate replica apparel on AI models — front AND back shots
- Use the AI avatar pipeline (scripts/ai-avatar-pipeline.py) with reference face (assets/images/avatar/reference-face.png)
- WeShopAI for VTON (remember: params are SWAPPED — main_image=garment, background_image=person)
- Products missing images: check assets/images/products/ and fill ALL gaps
- Black Rose: 8 products, Love Hurts: 5 products, Signature: 12 products = 25 products need front+back = 50 images minimum
- Every product card, every collection page, every pre-order listing MUST show real model imagery

### 2. FULL CONTENT BUILD — EVERY PAGE
- Read EVERY template file in wordpress-theme/skyyrose-flagship/
- Fill every page with rich, luxury editorial content — zero placeholders, zero empty sections
- Homepage: hero animation, collections preview with real imagery, social proof, pre-order CTA
- Collection pages: full-bleed heroes, editorial stories, product showcases with hover effects, cross-collection nav
- Immersive pages: 3D storytelling scenes with product hotspots that close sales
- Pre-order gateway: all products with images, pricing, cart functionality, sign-in panel
- Header/footer: polished nav, social links, newsletter signup, brand footer

### 3. MENUS & NAVIGATION
- Register all menus in functions.php — primary, footer, mobile, collection nav
- Nav walkers working, mobile hamburger menu functional
- Breadcrumbs on every interior page
- All internal links resolve, no dead links
- Smooth scroll-to-section for single-page sections

### 4. SEO — MAKE IT RANK
- Every page: unique title tag, meta description, Open Graph (og:title, og:description, og:image)
- JSON-LD structured data: Organization, Product (with price, availability, images), BreadcrumbList
- Single H1 per page, proper heading hierarchy (H1>H2>H3)
- All images have descriptive alt text
- Canonical URLs, sitemap-friendly markup
- Performance: Core Web Vitals optimized (LCP, FID, CLS)

### 5. MARKETPLACE-GRADE POLISH
- Design system: consistent spacing, typography scale, color tokens (#B76E79 rose gold, #0a0a0a dark, #D4AF37 gold)
- Luxury micro-interactions: hover effects, scroll animations, parallax, cursor effects
- Responsive: flawless on mobile, tablet, desktop, ultrawide
- Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA — ARIA labels, focus traps, keyboard nav, reduced motion support
- Security: all output escaped, CSP headers, no inline scripts
- Performance: lazy loading images, critical CSS, minified assets, optimized fonts

### 6. VERIFICATION — USE EVERY GATE
- Run ALL 8 gate checkers on every file: BUILD, TYPES, LINT, ACCESSIBILITY, PERFORMANCE, SEO, SECURITY, VISUAL
- Track costs with cost_tracker throughout
- Use output_writer for safe file writing (path traversal protection)
- Do NOT break existing functionality — read before writing, test after every change
- pytest -v after every file touch

### BRAND (NON-NEGOTIABLE)
- Tagline: 'Luxury Grows from Concrete.' — the ONLY tagline
- NEVER use 'Where Love Meets Luxury' — it is DEAD
- Rose gold #B76E79 | Dark #0a0a0a | Gold #D4AF37
- Luxury tone: confident, aspirational, street-meets-high-fashion

Work page by page. Deploy every specialist. Leave NOTHING unfinished. This theme should look like a $50K agency build.
